name: AmaZoo
short_description: Help KoKo on his first day at work! Push, kick, grab and rearrange the boxes, while avoiding the dangers throughout the mega-warehouse. Solve all the puzzles and finally reach the exit!
detailed_description:
Hi, I'm KoKo. I'm the new order picker at AmaZoo. My job is to get these boxes to the right place—or at least, I think it is. I don’t have all the instructions yet, and there are some dangerous things around here that I’m not too sure about. Can you help me move all these boxes and find the way out? I really can’t wait for this long day to be over!

 

 

AmaZoo is a progressive and varied puzzle game inspired by the classic Sokoban, reimagined with a side-view perspective reminiscent of old-school 2D games.

Enjoy an intuitive and engaging experience as you solve over 100 puzzles across multiple stages, each carefully crafted to challenge your logical thinking.

Your goal is to move and organize various types of boxes to clear the way to the exit and advance to the next stage. But beware—some boxes have unexpected behaviors, and one wrong move can quickly turn a simple task into a tricky challenge!

 

 

There are several types of ‘boxes’ in the game, each with unique characteristics and mechanisms. As KoKo, you’ll need to use your skills to carry, drop, throw, stack, jump, and climb with the boxes in hand. And if one gets in your way or drives you crazy, don’t hesitate to kick it out of your path!

 

 

AmaZoo’s warehouses are anything but safe—definitely not up to humanoid safety standards. You’ll encounter towering staircases, compactors, faulty machinery, spikes, lasers, and even explosive hazards. Be careful, KoKo—workplace accidents are just around the corner!

 

 

Don’t let the calm atmosphere fool you—progression brings increasingly challenging puzzles designed to push your logic and creativity to the limit. Will you rise to the occasion?

If you enjoy a challenge, you can replay levels to beat your own record! But remember: optimizing your work is key.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
